name: Myth-con.  The Mythical creatures convention
description:
YOU have been invited to attend the most impressive and popular gathering of Mythical creatures in all the multiverses.

MYTH-CON

Come and find the perfect potions. Maybe learn from tips from the experts. The choice is yours!

Disclaimer: This is a work of FICTION. There are no ties to any real entity. This is for entertainment only.

Open world RP. Choose you Path. Choose your Destiny!
